mapper.select:
/* adm-item-itemunit-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemUnitCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT A.OWKEY ,C.OWNM ,A.ICUNITKEY ,B.ICUNITTYPE ,'ICUTTYPE' ||';'|| B.ICUNITTYPE AS ICUTTYPE_DESC ,B.ICUNITQTY ,A.CLOSDATE ,B.INSERTDATE ,B.UPDATEDATE ,B.INSERTURKEY ,B.UPDATEURKEY ,B.ICUNITORDER ,(SELECT MAX(C.ICNM) FROM TADMIN_MST_IC C WHERE C.ICKEY = A.ICUNITKEY) ICNM ,(SELECT MAX(C.ICKEY) FROM TADMIN_MST_IC C WHERE C.ICKEY = A.ICUNITKEY) ICKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUT A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICUNITKEY = B.ICUNITKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON A.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND A.ICUNITKEY = IC.ICUNITKEY WHERE IC.DELYN ='N' ) A
WHERE #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

/* adm-item-itemunit-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemIcutCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT A.OWKEY ,A.ICUNITKEY ,B.ICUNITTYPE ,'ICUTTYPE' ||';'|| B.ICUNITTYPE AS ICUTTYPE_DESC ,B.ICUNITQTY ,A.CLOSDATE ,B.INSERTDATE ,B.INSERTURKEY ,B.UPDATEDATE ,B.UPDATEURKEY ,B.ICUNITORDER ,(SELECT MAX(C.ICNM) FROM TADMIN_MST_IC C WHERE C.ICKEY = A.ICUNITKEY) ICNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUT A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICUNITKEY = B.ICUNITKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON A.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND A.ICUNITKEY = IC.ICUNITKEY WHERE IC.DELYN ='N' )

/* adm-item-itemunit-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstIcutxtypexct */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,A.OWKEY ,A.ICUNITKEY ,A.CTKEY ,B.CTNM ,A.ICUNITTYPE FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPEXCT A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND B.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICUNITKEY = #{icunitkey} AND A.ICUNITTYPE = #{icunittype} AND B.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y'

/* adm-item-itemunit-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemUnitType */ SELECT A.OWKEY ,C.MASTERUPDATEIMPOS AS FN_GET_MASTER_IMPOS ,A.ICUNITKEY ,B.ICUNITTYPE ,B.ICUNITQTY ,A.CLOSDATE ,B.INSERTDATE ,B.INSERTURKEY ,B.ICUNITORDER ,(SELECT MAX(C.ICNM) FROM TADMIN_MST_IC C WHERE C.ICKEY = A.ICUNITKEY) ICNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUT A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICUNITKEY = B.ICUNITKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICUNITKEY = #{icunitkey}
AND B.ICUNITTYPE = #{icunittype}

/* adm-item-itemunit-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstIcut */ SELECT INSERTDATE ,UPDATEDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEURKEY ,ICUNITKEY ,CLOSDATE FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUT WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ICUNITKEY = #{icunitkey}

/* adm-item-itemunit-sql-oracle.xml - selecticuttypeChk */ SELECT I.ICUNITTYPE, T.ICUNITKEY FROM ( SELECT OWKEY , ICUNITKEY , CASE WHEN ICUNITKEY=#{icunitkey} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS KEYORDER , SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE='EA' AND ICUNITQTY=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EA_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE='CS' AND ICUNITQTY=COALESCE(#{boxqtyset}, 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS BOX_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE='BOL' AND ICUNITQTY=COALESCE(#{bolqtyset}, 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS BOL_CNT FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} GROUP BY OWKEY, ICUNITKEY HAVING COUNT(1) = 3 /*ea, cs, bol 이 모두 있어야 set로 봄*/ ) T JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE I ON T.OWKEY = I.OWKEY AND T.ICUNITKEY = I.ICUNITKEY AND I.ICUNITORDER = 1 WHERE 1=1 AND T.EA_CNT > 0 AND T.BOX_CNT > 0 AND T.BOL_CNT > 0 ORDER BY T.KEYORDER , T.ICUNITKEY DESC
mapper.insert: /* adm-item-itemunit-sql-oracle.xml - insertTAdminMstIcut */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_ICUT ( OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUNITKEY /*상품 단위 코드*/ , CLOSDATE /*종료 일시*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUNITKEY /*상품 단위 코드*/ , SUBSTR(#{closdate}, 0, 14) , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} FROM ( SELECT T.OWKEY , T.ICUNITKEY , CASE WHEN IU.ICUNITKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM ( SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , #{icunitkey} AS ICUNITKEY ) T LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUT IU ON T.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND T.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY ) TT WHERE SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.select:
/* adm-item-itemunit-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstIcutxtype */ SELECT OWKEY ,ICUNITKEY ,ICUNITTYPE ,ICUNITORDER ,ICUNITQTY ,INSERTDATE ,UPDATEDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEURKEY ,(SELECT MAX(C.ICNM) FROM TADMIN_MST_IC C WHERE C.ICKEY = A.ICUNITKEY) ICNM FROM ( SELECT A.OWKEY ,A.ICUNITKEY ,A.ICUNITTYPE ,A.ICUNITORDER ,A.ICUNITQTY ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE A ) A WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ICUNITKEY = #{icunitkey}
AND ICUNITTYPE = #{icunittype}
mapper.insert: /* adm-item-itemunit-sql-oracle.xml - insertTAdminMstByAmsIcutxtypexct */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPEXCT ( OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUNITKEY /*물품 단위 코드*/ , ICUNITTYPE /*물품 단위 유형*/ , CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT TT.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , TT.ICUNITKEY /*물품 단위 코드*/ , TT.ICUNITTYPE /*물품 단위 유형*/ , #{ctkey} AS CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , #{sysdate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{surkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{surkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT IC.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , IC.ICUNITKEY /*물품 단위 코드*/ , IU.ICUNITTYPE /*물품 단위 유형*/ , CASE WHEN M.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM TADMIN_MST_IC IC JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPEXCT M ON IU.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND IU.ICUNITKEY = M.ICUNITKEY AND IU.ICUNITTYPE = M.ICUNITTYPE AND M.CTKEY = #{ctkey} WHERE IC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IC.ICKEY = #{ickey} ) TT WHERE TT.SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.select: /* adm-item-itemunit-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemUnitUseYn */ SELECT A.ICUNITKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_IC A LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICSB B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC D ON A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.ACKEY = D.ACKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ICUNITKEY IN (#{icunitkeyAry})
